item.title: The Colosseum is remarkable, but it’s not one of a kind...There are over 200 ancient Roman arenas spread across three continents, many of which could accommodate over 50,000 spectators..

item.title: The Archbishop of Puerto Rico has put out an open letter demanding Trump PERSONALLY apologize to the Puerto Rican people.
item.description: "González was echoed by the Rev. Gabriel Salguero, who heads the National Latino Evangelical Coalition, said his phone began buzzing with texts and phone calls as soon as footage of Hinchcliffe’s comments began circulating on social media on Sunday. “I was on the phone for hours after that,” said Salguero, a Floridian whose family is part of the Puerto Rican diaspora. “Our community is deeply offended. We don’t endorse candidates, but we do endorse decency.”" If you should never go in against a Sicilian when death is on the line, you should probably also not insult what's probably one of the largest and most tight knit ethnic communities in the United States. https://religionnews.com/2024/10/28/racist-jokes-at-trump-rally-spark-outrage-among-hispanic-christians/
item.dc:creator: adamabrown

item.title: A cosplay collection of Demona from Disney's "GARGOYLES"
item.description:
Marina Sirtia (Deanna Troi from Star Trek TNG) played the voice of Demona. Here she's reunited with Data (Brent Spiner), who played the voice of duplicitous trickster Puck... right out of Shakespeare's "A Midsummer Night's Dream"
Gracie the Cosplay Lass
https://www.instagram.com/graciethecosplaylass/?hl=en
To the right, for those who don't know, is Marina Sirtis (Deanna Troi on TNG) the actual voice actress for DEMONA https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w2BOGV9gkso
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Compilation of noted voter fraud in Georgia
item.description:
1. Ballot Staffing (To Cancel Station): When GD (georgian dream pro-russia party) failed to score a victory in a particular station, they staffed the ballot box with multiple ballots demonstrably so that the station would get cancelled. This is Marneuli precinct, it was closed following ballot-stuffing evidence.
2. Violation of secrecy of vote: Sometimes a camera was directed at the voting booth, the boxes were not sealed, and nearly all ballots revealed whom the voter had chosen. Both authorized and unauthorized individuals accompanied voters into the booth.
3. Physical violence: Physical violence occurred against observers, journalists, and ordinary citizens both inside and outside the precincts. Mobsters were mobilized in vehicles near the precincts.
4. The opposition representatives and commission members were assaulted.
5. Non-authorized persons and chaos in the precincts: Resulting in chaos and disorder, providing a perfect opportunity for ballot stuffing and other forms of electoral fraud. These individuals often initiated quarrels inside the precinct and directed voters inside the booths.
6. Two Ballots: Some govt. affiliated people received two ballots.
7. Disregard of Marking Procedures: There were many instances of marking liquid being NOT being applied, being removed, and/or UV-Light device malfunction.
8. Bribery: Multiple well-documented cases of bribery; giving people various amounts of money as an incentive to vote for the ruling regime.
9. Hindering the observers: Election observers were hindered in their observations, not allowed to move freely (or at all) within the precincts, physically blocked, instructed not to look at the verification apparatus, inking checks, or inking procedures,
10. Errors in the voter lists: There were multiple errors in the voter lists at the electoral precincts, either including the names of deceased persons or omitting individuals who were directed to vote at that precinct.
11. Device malfunctions: Electronic devices often malfunctioned.
12. Counting invalid ballots: Invalid ballots were always counted in favor of GD. In some instances, valid ballots that should have counted for the opposition were marked as invalid.
13. Agitators with voters' lists: Agitators were equipped with voter lists indicating who had shown up and who was to be transported to the precinct to vote. Often, these lists were issued by the CEC, which the agitators should not have had access to.
14. Agitation at the precinct: Typically carried out by local government representatives, members of criminal subcultures, or, in some cases, members of the precinct election commission and Georgian Dream party representatives.
15. Vote counting procedures: Vote counters were not properly selected, pens were on the table of the vote counters, and ballots in the mobile ballot boxes were not integrated into the stationary box. sauce: https://x.com/fella_soldier/status/1850998427116544339
item.dc:creator: nickontop

item.title: Memes vol 392
item.description:
I think I’m depressed- well I also didn’t take my pills today
I got fired for attendance issues (I had to call in a lot because of period pain- my doctor says it sounds like endometriosis but I won’t know until November) that’s not the only reason I called in though so much- I just hate work
I had a ton of friends though
Me
English is red, science is green
“I’ve been deeper inside her than you’ll ever be”
Liza Jane and Scruffy tax
Froggy tax
Nessie tax. She scratched my chest up so bad after this
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: When you lose ya remote so you gotta freak the tv to find the buttons
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Need to throw something at the void
item.description: I thought it was a kink at first, but the longer I wear one I'm really just... enjoying it? I have no intent of fully cross-dressing even. I am comfortable with my male identity and sexuality. But I've always been fascinated by bras regardless back into my teens (I'm pushing 40 now), and about 6 weeks ago I decided to buy one. One turned into... more than one. Now, as long as I'm home alone and not going anywhere, I'm wearing a bra. And honestly? Since I did some research and measured myself and made sure I got a fitting one, I'm seeing... benefits? Like I'm noticing/correcting my own posture more (I slouch a lot) since I'm actually physically supported? Not sure if this goes anywhere or is a throwaway. It might die in usersub. But I wanted to vent it somewhere, anonymously, that I'm a straight, cis man who's decided - at lest for now - to wear a bra on the regular.
item.dc:creator: pinballprogrock

item.title: Have an adorable bat for Halloween!
item.description: The painted bat is a small, brightly colored bat species found in parts of South and Southeast Asia. Its vibrant orange and black fur makes it stand out among other bats, giving it a unique, eye-catching appearance. These bats are usually found roosting in banana leaves or large plants, blending in with their surroundings. sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/DA2P9cxJ-Ze/
item.dc:creator: ChorizoPig
